distinctive_elements: New background music for staff roll sequence

notes: T2 tier data: Limited audio/music documentation available. Wikipedia confirms composers (Yoko Shimomura, Isao Abe) and notes new staff roll music, but provides no tempo, key, chord progression, or SFX characteristic data. The Cutting Room Floor source was not usable due to access restrictions. No stage-specific music parameters, track listings, or sound effect details are documented in available sources.
